## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `cargo test --all` passes (conformance suite stays green)
- [ ] Added/updated conformance vectors for any behavior change (a new condition needs both a positive and an adversarial vector)
- [ ] Change stays within scope — verification only, no prover / strategy / dataset logic
